summary: Parallel review: FAIL (3 critical, 8 warning, 5 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: ЁЯФ┤ `bin/lib/run.mjs:1627` тАФ `activePhases` used outside its block scope; declared with `const` inside the first `if (usage.dispatches > 0)` block (line 1602, closes at 1621), but referenced in a **separate** `if (usage.dispatches > 0)` block (line 1625). `const` is block-scoped in JS тАФ causes `ReferenceError: activePhases is not defined` on every real `agt run` that dispatches an agent. Confirmed via reproduction script. Fix: re-declare inline at line 1626: `const activePhases = ["brainstorm","build","review","simplify"].filter(p => phases[p]);`

ЁЯЯб `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:505` тАФ Warning path covered by source-text inspection only. Both warning tests (lines 505тАУ541) read `run.mjs` as a string and check for expected tokens. No behavioral test exercises `_runSingleFeature` with `findings.warning > 0` and verifies that `simplify-eval.md` is created and `progress.md` is appended.

ЁЯФ┤ `bin/lib/run.mjs:1627` тАФ `activePhases` referenced outside its declaring block scope; `const activePhases` is declared at line 1602 inside the first `if (usage.dispatches > 0)` block (closes line 1621) and is not accessible in the sibling block at line 1625; throws `ReferenceError` on every real dispatch тАФ add `const activePhases = ["brainstorm","build","review","simplify"].filter(p => phases[p]);` at line 1626 inside the second block

ЁЯЯб `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:505` тАФ Both warning-path tests are source-text assertions; condition mutations (e.g. `> 0` тЖТ `>= 2`, removing `!escalated`) are undetectable; no behavioral test exercises the path at runtime тАФ add a test providing `findings: { warning: 2 }` and asserting `simplify-eval.md` creation and `appendProgress` call (carried from run_1 backlog)

**Root cause of the ЁЯФ┤:** The `activePhases2` deduplication fix removed the local redeclaration in the second `if (usage.dispatches > 0)` block and replaced it with a reference to `activePhases` from the first block. JavaScript `const` is block-scoped тАФ when the first block closes at line 1621, the binding ceases to exist. The second block at line 1625 is a sibling, not a child. Result: `ReferenceError: activePhases is not defined` on any run that dispatches at least one agent. The test suite misses this entirely because `_runSingleFeature` is mocked in all harnesses.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/run.mjs:1535` тАФ `simplify-eval.md` records warning **count only**; actual warning text from the agent is discarded; file is not actionable without re-running тАФ add raw warning lines to the file content

ЁЯЯб `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:505` тАФ Both warning tests are source-text string checks; they cannot detect condition mutations (`> 0` тЖТ `>= 10`), removed `appendProgress`, or wrong file path тАФ add a behavioral test that drives the warning path with `findings: { warning: 2 }` and asserts file creation and progress append
**Overall: PASS.** Core requirements are correct and verified. Two ЁЯЯб backlog items match findings already filed by Engineer, Tester, and Architect reviewers in this same cycle тАФ no new blockers.

ЁЯЯб test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:505 тАФ Warning-path test asserts source string presence, not runtime behavior; mutations to the `> 0` threshold, `writeFileSync` call site, or `appendProgress` invocation are invisible тАФ add a behavioral test that provides `findings: { warning: 2 }` and asserts `simplify-eval.md` is created with correct content

ЁЯЯб test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:532 тАФ `!beforeFinalize.includes("warning")` uses a fixed 300-char distance window, not a semantic anchor; if code grows between the warning block and `harness("finalize"`, the window shrinks and a finalize-guard regression could go undetected тАФ replace with a regex matching the exact guard expression

**Summary:** Implementation is correct. The `!escalated && !reverted` guard fix (task-4) prevents double `progress.md` entries. Finalize gate is gated on `escalated` only. `activePhases2` duplication is confirmed fixed. The two ЁЯЯб findings are the same source-text-vs-behavioral gap every prior reviewer flagged тАФ they reduce mutation resistance but don't impair the current feature. No blockers.
